name: SUPERIOR VENA CAVA SYNDROME
definition: obstruction of SVC with development of collateral pathways
dominant_finding: increased tracer uptake in quadrate lobe + posterior aspect of medial segment of left lobe
discriminating_features: increased tracer uptake in quadrate lobe + posterior aspect of medial segment of left lobe

NUC: increased tracer uptake in quadrate lobe + posterior aspect of medial segment of left lobe
